name: Grandmother's Favorite Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped green onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine bread crumbs, crumbled corn bread, biscuits, onion, celery, parsley, sage, salt, and pepper. Toss well.
2. Add the turkey broth, butter, and eggs to the mixture. Mix gently until all ingredients are evenly incorporated. If needed, add extra broth to achieve a moist texture.
3. Loosely stuff the neck and body cavities of the turkey, or for easier preparation and serving, cook separately in a well-greased baking dish or casserole during the last 45 minutes of turkey roasting time.
4. Before serving, blend the stuffing from the turkey with that cooked separately to ensure even flavor distribution.
